sections.title: Before putting Evil Bob to sleep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need help, I've been kidnapped by an evil cat!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Meow! Errr... I c-c-c-can't help you... He'll kill us all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now you listen to me! He's just a little cat! There must be something I can do!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: F-f-f-fish... give him the f-f-f-fish he likes and he might f- f-f-fall asleep.

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Look... over t-t-there! That fishing spot c-c-contains the f-f-f-fish he likes.

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: F-f-f-fish... give him the f-f-f-fish he likes and he might f- f-f-fall asleep.

sections.title: After putting Evil Bob to sleep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evil Bob has fallen asleep, come quickly!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Come? Come where?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Away from this place! To Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: You go, [player name], I don't belong there... I belong here, in ScapeRune. This is the only place I can ever go...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I love you!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Our love can never be, sweet [player name].

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Go now! Go, and don't look back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, alright then, I'll be off! See you around!

sections.title: Before putting Evil Bob to sleep

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Meow!!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Why are you meowing?

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: I mean... L-l-l-leave me alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just want to talk to you, that's all.

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: No, he's insane! He'll kill us all! Like he killed the others!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Meow!!!

sections.title: After putting Evil Bob to sleep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evil Bob is sleeping! You can escape!

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: Escape? Escape where?

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: No, Evil Bob will track us down eventually and when he does...

lines.speaker: Servant
lines.text: No, I dare not leave this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Suit yourself then.
